ddls:
CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the achievement (e.g., sports, academics) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the achievement */,
  "organized_body_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organized body responsible for the event */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., medal, participation) */,
  "award" TEXT /* Name of the award or medal received */,
  "date_of_achievement" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "achievement_level" TEXT /* Level of the achievement (e.g., local, national, international) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the achievement */,
  "proof_document" TEXT /* Reference to a document or URL that proves the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_organized_body_id FOREIGN KEY ("organized_body_id") REFERENCES organized_bodies ("organized_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organized_bodies" (
  "organized_body_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organized body */,
  "organized_body_name" TEXT /* Name of the organized body */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organized body */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the organized body */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organized body */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the organized body */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the organized body was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the organized body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organized_body_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the student is expected to graduate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievement_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field that was changed */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field that was changed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievement_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievement_logs_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)
